name: nature-comsol-simulation
description: Nature-style COMSOL/FEA mechanical simulation manuscript writing, Methods reporting, validation, mesh-convergence, and reviewer-risk audit skill.

interface.shortDescription: Audit and write COMSOL/FEA simulation papers
interface.longDescription: Use Nature COMSOL Simulation to audit COMSOL and finite-element mechanical simulation manuscripts, write bounded Results and Methods, plan figures, separate verification from validation, report mesh convergence and solver settings, prepare reproducibility checklists, and draft reviewer-response strategy without inventing model evidence.
defaultPrompt: Audit this COMSOL simulation manuscript for mesh convergence and reviewer risk.
Write a Nature-style Results paragraph for this COMSOL solid-mechanics model, with missing inputs and claim boundaries.
Check whether this contact-pressure figure supports the claimed wear-reduction mechanism.
